description:

ref_sol: python -u run.py \--model micn \--mode regre \--data ETTm2 \--features M \--freq t \--conv_kernel 12 16 \--d_layers 1 \--d_model 512 \--seq_len 96 \--label_len 96 \--pred_len 96
